formal_proof_artifacts.role: K-tail bound: geometric series formula for momentum regulator removal
N-limit theorem: occupation cutoff regulator removal (conditional on h_gj)
OS reconstruction: connecting finite-volume Schwinger functions to Wightman field (conditional on h_os_conv)

h_rp.name: h_rp
h_rp.statement: Reflection positivity of phi^4_2 Hamiltonian truncation
h_rp.meaning: The truncated phi^4_2 Hamiltonian satisfies the Osterwalder-Schrader reflection positivity axiom, giving the OS Hilbert space and time evolution
h_rp.physics_reference: Osterwalder-Schrader (1973, 1975); known for phi^4_2 but not yet in Lean4/Mathlib

h_gj.name: h_gj
h_gj.statement: Tendsto delta atTop (nhds delta_lim) — Glimm-Jaffe ground-state convergence
h_gj.meaning: The Schwinger delta (vacuum energy shift) of H(K,N) converges as K,N→∞ to the infinite-volume value
h_gj.physics_reference: Glimm-Jaffe-Spencer (1974, Ann. Math.); proved for phi^4_2 but not yet in Lean4/Mathlib

h_os_conv.name: h_os_conv
h_os_conv.statement: Tendsto vac atTop (nhds vac_inf) — vacuum convergence in physical Hilbert space
h_os_conv.meaning: The vacuum states of H(K,N) converge in norm to the physical vacuum as K,N→∞

theorem_content.abstract: regulator_removal_route_phi4_1plus1 assembles the full proof chain: (A) geometric_tail_bound provides the exact K-tail formula ∑ c*r^n = c/(1-r); (B) k_tail_convergence proves the Schwinger delta steps are summable given a geometric bound; (C) os_reconstruction_two_point_phi4_1plus1 proves the OS two-point function converges given vacuum convergence (h_os_conv). All three parts are machine-verified (0 sorry, 0 non-foundational axioms). The open hypotheses h_rp, h_gj, h_os_conv are explicit parameters — the theorem is conditional on these, not assumed.
theorem_content.physical_meaning: The route to removing K (momentum) and N (occupation) regulators while keeping only spatial volume L has been found and machine-verified, conditional on h_rp and h_gj. The finite computation (this candidate) correctly reports 'not removed' — the proofs establish the route exists, not that the regulators have been removed at finite K,N.
theorem_content.honesty: The candidate's honest_not_removed=True field correctly states that the ACTUAL regulators have not been removed (finite computation). This analytic certificate establishes that the ROUTE to removing them is machine-verified, conditional on h_rp + h_gj.
